---
title: "Does religiosity buffer the negative effect of moving on giving?"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
# Research design:
#   - Panel of PSID families (2001-2021, biennial)
#   - Outcome: total charitable giving (sum of donation categories)
#   - Treatment: moved (binary, from "WHY MOVED" reason codes)
#   - Moderator: religious (binary, Religious_Preference != 0/97/98/99)
#   - Model: family fixed effects with moved x religious interaction
#   - Family FE absorbs time-invariant family characteristics
#   - Wave FE absorbs macro trends in giving
#
# NOTE: We use id_1968 (1968 Family Identifier) as the longitudinal key
# to track the same family lineage across waves. The Interview Number
# (family_id) is only unique within a wave and gets recycled.
# Splitoffs are deduplicated by keeping the oldest head per lineage.

library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(fixest)
library(here)
```

```{r load_and_derive}
# ---- 1. Load the family-level panel ----
panel <- read_parquet(here("output", "psid_family_year_2001_latest.parquet"))

cat("Raw panel:", nrow(panel), "rows,", ncol(panel), "columns\n")
cat("Waves:", paste(sort(unique(panel$wave)), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Unique id_1968 (lineages):", n_distinct(panel$id_1968), "\n\n")

# ---- 2. Derive key variables ----

# 2a. Total giving: sum available dollar-amount donation columns
donation_cols <- c(
  "DOLLAR AMT OF RELIGIOUS DONATIONS",
  "DOLLAR AMT OF NEEDY DONATIONS",
  "DOLLAR AMT OF HEALTH DONATIONS",
  "DOLLAR AMT OF EDUCATION DONATIONS"
)
available_donation_cols <- donation_cols[donation_cols %in% names(panel)]
cat("Donation columns found:", length(available_donation_cols), "\n")
cat("  ", paste(available_donation_cols, collapse = "\n   "), "\n\n")

# 2b. Build analysis dataset
#     First, clean PSID sentinel codes from dollar amounts:
#     999997 = "Other", 999998 = "Don't Know", 999999 = "NA/Refused"
analysis <- panel |>
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(available_donation_cols),
      ~ if_else(.x >= 999997, NA_real_, .x)
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(
    # --- Outcome: total giving ---
    total_giving = rowSums(
      across(all_of(available_donation_cols),
             ~ replace_na(pmax(.x, 0), 0)),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    log_giving = log1p(total_giving),

    # --- Treatment: whether the family moved since last wave ---
    #     "WHY MOVED 1ST" coded 0 = did not move; 1-9 = reason
    #     97/98/99 are sentinel codes (Other/DK/Refused) — treat
    #     as NA because we can't confirm a move actually occurred
    moved = case_when(
      is.na(`WHY MOVED 1ST`) ~ 0L,
      `WHY MOVED 1ST` >= 97 ~ NA_integer_,
      `WHY MOVED 1ST` > 0 ~ 1L,
      TRUE ~ 0L
    ),

    # --- Moderator: religious affiliation ---
    #     PSID codes: 0 = none, 1-13 = denominations,
    #                 97 = other, 98 = DK, 99 = NA/refused
    religious = case_when(
      is.na(Religious_Preference) ~ NA_integer_,
      Religious_Preference %in% c(0, 97, 98, 99) ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ 1L
    ),

    # --- Controls ---
    age = as.numeric(head_age),
    age2 = age^2
  ) |>
  select(
    id_1968, family_id, wave, interview_year,
    total_giving, log_giving,
    moved, religious,
    Religious_Preference,
    age, age2,
    `Current State`,
    any_of("n_children_u18")
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(id_1968), !is.na(religious))

# --- Splitoff dedup: keep main family per lineage per wave ---
n_pre <- nrow(analysis)
analysis <- analysis |>
  group_by(id_1968, wave) |>
  slice_max(age, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup()
cat("Splitoff dedup: kept", nrow(analysis), "of", n_pre, "rows\n")

# --- Lagged religiosity (pre-move moderator) ---
analysis <- analysis |>
  arrange(id_1968, wave) |>
  group_by(id_1968) |>
  mutate(religious_lag = lag(religious, order_by = wave)) |>
  ungroup()

cat("\nAnalysis dataset:", nrow(analysis),
    "family-wave observations\n")
cat("Unique id_1968 lineages:",
    n_distinct(analysis$id_1968), "\n")
cat("Movers:", sum(analysis$moved == 1, na.rm = TRUE), "(",
    round(100 * mean(analysis$moved == 1, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    "%)\n")
cat("Religious:", sum(analysis$religious == 1), "(",
    round(100 * mean(analysis$religious == 1), 1), "%)\n")
cat("Religious (lagged, non-NA):",
    sum(!is.na(analysis$religious_lag)), "\n\n")
```

```{r descriptives}
# ---- 3. Descriptive statistics ----
# Using LAGGED religiosity (pre-move status)
desc_table <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved)) |>
  group_by(moved, religious_lag) |>
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_giving = mean(total_giving, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_giving = median(total_giving, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_log_giving = mean(log_giving, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("Mean giving by move status x PRE-MOVE religiosity:\n")
print(desc_table)
```

```{r models}
# ---- 4. Fixed effects regression ----
# id_1968 FE absorbs time-invariant family characteristics
# wave FE absorbs macro trends in giving
# religious_lag = religiosity from the PRIOR wave (pre-move)
#   — avoids endogeneity from moving changing religious ID

# Subset with non-missing lagged religiosity
analysis_lag <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved))

cat("Lagged-religion sample:", nrow(analysis_lag),
    "obs (first wave of each family dropped)\n\n")

# Model 1: Does moving reduce giving?
m1 <- feols(log_giving ~ moved | id_1968 + wave,
            data = analysis_lag)

# Model 2: Does PRE-MOVE religiosity moderate the effect?
m2 <- feols(
  log_giving ~ moved * religious_lag | id_1968 + wave,
  data = analysis_lag
)

# Model 3: Add age controls
m3 <- feols(
  log_giving ~ moved * religious_lag + age + age2 |
    id_1968 + wave,
  data = analysis_lag
)

# Cluster standard errors by family
etable(m1, m2, m3,
       headers = c("Baseline", "Interaction", "Controls"),
       vcov = "cluster",
       se.below = TRUE)
```

```{r interpretation}
# ---- 5. Interpretation ----
cat("\n=== KEY COEFFICIENTS (Model 2) ===\n")
coefs <- coef(m2)
cat("moved:               ",
    round(coefs["moved"], 4),
    " -- effect of moving (pre-move non-religious)\n")
cat("religious_lag:        ",
    round(coefs["religious_lag"], 4),
    " -- within-family effect of being religious\n")
cat("moved:religious_lag:  ",
    round(coefs["moved:religious_lag"], 4),
    " -- DIFFERENTIAL effect for pre-move religious\n")
cat("\nPositive interaction = religious people's",
    "giving decreases LESS after moving.\n")
cat("Negative interaction = religious people's",
    "giving decreases MORE after moving.\n")
```

```{r plot_setup}
PLOT_DIR <- here("plots")
if (!dir.exists(PLOT_DIR)) dir.create(PLOT_DIR, recursive = TRUE)
```

```{r plot_descriptive, fig.width=7, fig.height=5}
# ---- 6. Descriptive bar chart: mean giving by moved x religiosity ----
desc_plot <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved)) |>
  mutate(
    Moved     = factor(moved, levels = c(0, 1),
                       labels = c("Did not move", "Moved")),
    Religious = factor(religious_lag, levels = c(0, 1),
                       labels = c("Not religious (prior wave)",
                                  "Religious (prior wave)"))
  ) |>
  group_by(Moved, Religious) |>
  summarise(
    mean_giving   = mean(total_giving, na.rm = TRUE),
    se            = sd(total_giving, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    median_giving = median(total_giving, na.rm = TRUE),
    n             = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(desc_plot, aes(x = Moved, y = mean_giving, fill = Religious)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_giving - 1.96 * se,
        ymax = mean_giving + 1.96 * se),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0("n=", scales::comma(n))),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
    vjust = -0.5, size = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#7f8c8d", "#2980b9")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar_format()) +
  labs(
    title    = "Mean Charitable Giving by Move Status and Pre-Move Religiosity",
    subtitle = "PSID 2003-2021 (lagged religiosity sample)",
    x = NULL, y = "Mean total giving ($)",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave(file.path(PLOT_DIR, "descriptive_giving_by_group.png"),
       width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r plot_descriptive_by_year, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}
# ---- 6b. Descriptive bar chart by year ----
desc_by_year <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved), wave >= 2003) |>
  mutate(
    Moved     = factor(moved, levels = c(0, 1),
                       labels = c("Did not move", "Moved")),
    Religious = factor(religious_lag, levels = c(0, 1),
                       labels = c("Not religious", "Religious"))
  ) |>
  group_by(wave, Moved, Religious) |>
  summarise(
    mean_giving = mean(total_giving, na.rm = TRUE),
    se          = sd(total_giving, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n           = n(),
    .groups     = "drop"
  )

ggplot(desc_by_year,
       aes(x = Moved, y = mean_giving, fill = Religious)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_giving - 1.96 * se,
        ymax = mean_giving + 1.96 * se),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0("n=", scales::comma(n))),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
    vjust = -0.5, size = 2.5
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ wave) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#7f8c8d", "#2980b9")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar_format()) +
  labs(
    title    = "Mean Giving by Move Status & Pre-Move Religiosity",
    subtitle = "PSID, by wave (lagged religiosity sample)",
    x = NULL, y = "Mean total giving ($)",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave(file.path(PLOT_DIR, "descriptive_giving_by_group_year.png"),
       width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

```{r plot_coefplot, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}
# ---- 7. Coefficient plot from the three models ----
coefplot(list("Baseline" = m1,
              "Interaction" = m2,
              "Controls" = m3),
         vcov = "cluster",
         keep = c("moved", "religious_lag",
                   "moved:religious_lag"),
         main = "Effect of Moving on log(Giving + 1)",
         sub  = "Family & wave FE, clustered SEs",
         ref.line = 0)

png(file.path(PLOT_DIR, "coefficient_plot.png"),
    width = 7, height = 4, units = "in", res = 300)
coefplot(list("Baseline" = m1,
              "Interaction" = m2,
              "Controls" = m3),
         vcov = "cluster",
         keep = c("moved", "religious_lag",
                  "moved:religious_lag"),
         main = "Effect of Moving on log(Giving + 1)",
         sub  = "Family & wave FE, clustered SEs",
         ref.line = 0)
dev.off()
```

```{r plot_trends, fig.width=9, fig.height=5}
# ---- 8. Giving trends over time by mover status x religiosity ----
trends <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved)) |>
  mutate(
    group = case_when(
      moved == 0 & religious_lag == 1 ~ "Stayer, Religious",
      moved == 0 & religious_lag == 0 ~ "Stayer, Not religious",
      moved == 1 & religious_lag == 1 ~ "Mover, Religious",
      moved == 1 & religious_lag == 0 ~ "Mover, Not religious"
    )
  ) |>
  group_by(wave, group) |>
  summarise(
    mean_log_giving = mean(log_giving, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(log_giving, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(trends, aes(x = wave, y = mean_log_giving,
                   colour = group, linetype = group)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = mean_log_giving - 1.96 * se,
        ymax = mean_log_giving + 1.96 * se,
        fill = group),
    alpha = 0.1, colour = NA
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
    "Stayer, Religious"     = "#2980b9",
    "Stayer, Not religious" = "#7f8c8d",
    "Mover, Religious"      = "#e74c3c",
    "Mover, Not religious"  = "#e67e22"
  )) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Stayer, Religious"     = "#2980b9",
    "Stayer, Not religious" = "#7f8c8d",
    "Mover, Religious"      = "#e74c3c",
    "Mover, Not religious"  = "#e67e22"
  )) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2001, 2021, 2)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Mean log(Giving + 1) Over Time by Group",
    subtitle = "PSID 2003-2021 (lagged religiosity sample)",
    x = "Wave", y = "Mean log(giving + 1)",
    colour = NULL, fill = NULL, linetype = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave(file.path(PLOT_DIR, "giving_trends_by_group.png"),
       width = 9, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r plot_move_rate, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}
# ---- 9. Moving rate over time by religiosity ----
move_rate <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved)) |>
  mutate(Religious = factor(religious_lag, levels = c(0, 1),
                            labels = c("Not religious", "Religious"))) |>
  group_by(wave, Religious) |>
  summarise(pct_moved = 100 * mean(moved), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(move_rate, aes(x = wave, y = pct_moved,
                      colour = Religious)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#7f8c8d", "#2980b9")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2001, 2021, 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  labs(
    title    = "Moving Rate Over Time by Pre-Move Religiosity",
    subtitle = "PSID 2003-2021",
    x = "Wave", y = "% who moved",
    colour = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave(file.path(PLOT_DIR, "move_rate_by_religiosity.png"),
       width = 7, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```
